items.title: The problem with being on the very bleeding edge of adoption is you’re going to constantly be c…
items.content: The problem with being on the very bleeding edge of adoption is you’re going to constantly be changing how you do things as the industry learns. The sweet spot is just a couple steps behind. Whatever is relatively new, but survives all of the churn.

items.title: Every time someone shits on Google or Meta they need to be reminded that those companies are un…
